youtube.title: 3 Business Credit Myths That Cost You Time #Shorts
youtube.description:
Three business credit myths that quietly cost people time and money — and what actually works.

Educational only — not financial advice. No guarantees.

This content may include affiliate links. If you use a link, Nexus/GoClearOnline may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.

#businesscredit #businessfunding #smallbusiness #entrepreneur #credittips

scenes.label: HOOK
scenes.caption: 3 myths that cost you time
scenes.vo: Three business credit myths that are quietly costing you time and money.
scenes.visual: Bold title card, Nexus blue underline, small stickman pointing up

scenes.label: MYTH 1
scenes.caption: Myth 1: revenue first
scenes.vo: Myth one: you need revenue first.
scenes.visual: Red myth card, stickman shrugging, big X stamp

scenes.label: TRUTH 1
scenes.caption: Truth: structure first
scenes.vo: Truth: you need structure first. Entity, business bank account, and accounts that actually report.
scenes.visual: Green truth card, checkmark, 3 mini icons: entity, bank, report

scenes.label: MYTH 2
scenes.caption: Myth 2: one card
scenes.vo: Myth two: one credit card builds your business credit.
scenes.visual: Single card icon with X, stickman confused

scenes.label: TRUTH 2
scenes.caption: Truth: a pattern, not one account
scenes.vo: Truth: bureaus want a pattern, not a single account. A few reporting accounts paid early beats one card.
scenes.visual: Multiple cards forming a rising bar chart

scenes.label: MYTH 3
scenes.caption: Myth 3: it's fast
scenes.visual: Stopwatch with X, stickman tapping foot

scenes.label: TRUTH 3
scenes.caption: Truth: it takes reporting cycles
scenes.vo: Truth: real reporting takes cycles. Anyone promising instant results is selling something.
scenes.visual: Calendar pages flipping, steady upward arrow

scenes.label: CTA
scenes.caption: Educational only — not advice
scenes.vo: Save this, and build it the boring, correct way. Follow for more.
scenes.visual: Nexus wordmark, bookmark icon, disclosure in small text
